Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0460 "TILT-0460" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Tilt.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The loading screen is based the Spectrum version and borrows the Codemasters logo from the Kwik Snax Spectrum loading screen.
